intent: 2BR / 2 baths clustered LDK smoke test, no carport. 10.5x10.5 lot gives a 6.5x6.5 envelope = 42.25 m2 floor -- the empirical minimum feasible size for this topology (10x10 is infeasible). Master ensuite + common bath share a wet-core plumbing wall; bath block sits between standard (front) and master (rear). Public side is a real living/dining/kitchen split (not open-plan great_room) -- living, dining, and kitchen stack front-to-rear in one column, the solver's default LDK arrangement.
must_haves: common bath publicly accessible from living
clustered baths (ensuite + common share a plumbing wall)
separate living, dining, and kitchen rooms stacked front-to-rear
